instruction: The Chrome logo outline is faint, clipped, and has an extra center ring. Restore the complete original icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 86 86" width="86" height="86">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="86" height="86" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/chrome.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="0.45"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><line x1="21.17" y1="8" x2="12" y2="8"/><line x1="3.95" y1="6.06" x2="8.54" y2="14"/><line x1="10.88" y1="21.94" x2="15.46" y2="14"/></g>
  <circle id="extra-center-ring" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="3" cx="64" cy="64" r="18" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/chrome.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><line x1="21.17" y1="8" x2="12" y2="8"/><line x1="3.95" y1="6.06" x2="8.54" y2="14"/><line x1="10.88" y1="21.94" x2="15.46" y2="14"/></g>
</svg>
